hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

INPUT=$(cat); TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.transcript_path // empty'); if [ -n "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && [ -f "$TRANSCRIPT" ]; then mkdir -p ~/.claude/backups && cp "$TRANSCRIPT" ~/.claude/backups/session-$(date +%s).jsonl; fi
